parameters.title: Regression modeling of indicators from different covariates
parameters.label: Regression modeling of indicators from different covariates using an array of the machine learning models. Available regression models include: ols (ordinary least square), theilsen (theilsen robust regressor), huber (huber robust regressor), knn (K-nearest neighbor regressor), detree (decision tree regressor), svr (support vector machine regressor), mlp (multi-layer perception), cubit (an expert based regressor) and plsr (partial least square regressor).

parameter.hint: The root fp of the project
The dataframe to use as input, raw = original spectra, previous = the latest saved parquet file(s), or state the name of the parquet file with spectra derived from earlier step(s) to use as input.
Comma separated list of the indicators to evaluate.
Comma separated list of the regressor to apply, valid entries: ols, theilsen, huber, knn, detree, svr, mlp, cubist, plsr.
Relative or absolute path to the JSON file with the multi_filter definition. If not set or set to none the default settings in the sci-kit learn package will be used.
whether or not to apply regression modeling using a train- test division of the source data (dataframe)
whether or not to apply regression modeling using a train- test division of the source data (dataframe)
whether or not to apply regression modeling using a k-fold approach

Maximum number of features to show in importance/permutation bar plots. 0 = show all. Y-axis labels are suppressed when showing more than 40 features.
